entry.title: Enter rate MYR/EUR rate type M for 18.05.2026 in the system settings
entry.content:
Hello Expert, 

we got the below error in the VF01 "Enter rate MYR/EUR rate type M for 18.05.2026 in the system settings".

local currency MYR and the EUR is assgined as Ref currency in the OB07
now, try to post the invoice for MYR customer means documeny currency is MYR. whereas the PGI is posted with currency 2 as EUR. 
whereas the Billing is giving this errror?

With Regards,
Dwaraka

entry.title: Post difference between book depreciation and Tax depreciation values in S4
entry.content:
Post difference between book depreciation and Tax depreciation values

In ECC, we have set up a delta depreciation area for Finland that posts the difference between book depreciation and tax calculation to the special accounts (table T095P).

In S4 HANA, there is not possible to post the difference between book depreciation and tax calculation in a delta depreciation area. 

We can only create a Delta Depreciation area for informational values - strictly mathematically – and not posted. --> correct?


The comparison between US GAAP and TAX GAAP can be generated using report S_ALR_87012013 – Depreciation Comparison. However, this would require creating a manual journal entry. Our colleagues in Finland would like an automated solution that posts entries for each asset.

Is there a country-specific solution for Finland and France, or how can the process be mapped in S4?

Does anyone have any ideas about this?
many thanks

entry.title: Schedule automatic payment - Payment medium - Payment advice - F110
entry.content:
Hello,

In NOVA solution, the payment process steps are:

  • Parameters creation - Profile: Accounting payable
  • Proposal management : Profile: Accounting payable
    • With payment medium 
    • Without Payment advice We need to create the payment file at proposal level due to file validation process out of SAP
  • Payment run- Profile: Treasury 
    • Post payments
    • Create Payment advice
    • No creation for XML file again as already validated and sent to the Bank.

We have tried modifying the authorization settings
Proposal: Accounts Payable profile: assign activity 15 - Create a payment document
Payment cycle: Treasury profile: remove activity 25 - Do not create a payment document

How can we resolve th

entry.title: Delta depreciation area: Post difference between book depreciation and Tax depreciation values S4
entry.content:
Delta depreciation area: Post difference between book depreciation and Tax depreciation values S4

In ECC, we have set up a delta depreciation area for Finland that posts the difference between book depreciation and tax calculation to the special accounts (table T095P).

In S4 HANA, there is not possible to post the difference between book depreciation and tax calculation in a delta depreciation area.

We can only create a Delta Depreciation area for informational values - strictly mathematically – and not posted. --> correct?


The comparison between US GAAP and TAX GAAP can be generated using report S_ALR_87012013 – Depreciation Comparison. However, this would require creating a manual journal entry. Our colleagues in Finland would like an automated solution that posts entries for each asset.

Is there a country-specific solution for Finland and France, or how can the process be mapped in S4?

many thanks

entry.title: Arrears By Net Due Date different between FBL5H and FBL5N
entry.content: There is a difference of values in the 'Arrears by Net Due Date' field in FBL5H and FBL5N for the same open item. In FBL5N the value is zero. We would like to know how these values are getting fetched and is this an expected behavior.

entry.title: SAP Bank file issue
entry.content: In Sap Bank file generation, the requirement is to generate Two Spaces at the end of text file header, kindly suggest the feasibility.

entry.title: Asset Accounting Depreciation varience issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working in SAP S/4HANA 2023 version.

We are facing an issue in Asset Accounting. After changing the depreciation key and useful life of an asset, the recalculated depreciation is not reflecting correctly.

We have changed useful life of asset 20 to 15 years but still the depreciation is calculating for 20 years.

Kindly provide the solution.

Thanks & Regards,

Fi& Co consultant.

entry.title: F110 Payment Work flow approval request not triggered to the two agents
entry.content:
Is is required to set up two workflow agents to approve a payment in F110 payment run approver workflow.

Standard work flow template - WS23200018 

Two agents were defined in Agent determination for the said payment amount range.

The 2 approvers do get the workflow request to approve the payment proposal, however, after one approver approves the request it passes the whole workflow to proceed to payment even without the approval from the second approver.

Could you please advice how to resolve this.

entry.title: To configure error messages for costing run
entry.content:
Need to configure below messages as "Error" message for costing run.

These messages are not available in the transaction OPR4_CK.

  1. CK461 : Routing either does not exist or contains no operations
  2. CK858 : No suitable or valid Production version found
  3. CK756 : Material in plant cannot be costed

entry.title: Unable to Post Asset With TT 150 with Document Type AB in Testing Environment i.e. Z02 and Z03.
entry.content: Unable to Post Asset With TT 150 with Document Type AB in Testing Environment i.e. Z02 and Z03.

entry.title: validation to prevent invoice reversal once asset capitalization is completed
entry.content:
Hi Team

PO: 4210000053

Company code: SF01

We have observed that all the IR entries associated to this PO were reversed although these were already capitalized. 

Attached the invoice and invoice reversal document numbers and attached the ECQ system configuration details.

Please confirm the tables where data is stored after posting the IR entry for a CWIP asset and after creating the settlement rule in CJIC and specifically the tables where settlement rule data is maintained.

Also, let me know whether we can implement a validation to prevent invoice reversal once asset capitalization is completed. Additionally, specify which tables need to be checked for creating this validation.

 

Regards,

Ravi Kiran

entry.title: problem occurring at the time of using ABAON
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

when doing asset acquisition posting for multiple assets at a time and error occurs. this we have not received before and last month I did a similar posting without this issue. posting to multiple assets is possible as long as you insert maximum of 5 assets at a time at the moment. attached screenshots of the error message

 Error message: "Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 002 not filled"

 

Kindly help us with this.

entry.title: Change cost center on Asset Retirement Obligation
entry.content: I am using transaction code /FOM/AM02 to Change Asset Retirement Obligation. The obligation has been released so the cost center field cannot be changed. My clients are going through a reorg so they need to change the cost center on some ARO’s. Is this possible? I cannot see any place in configuration to make the field changeable. The system I am working on is ECC.

entry.title: 今月取得し前月稼働の資産の償却費について
entry.content: 今月取得し前月稼働の資産の償却費について償却キーの償却開始年月を今月から先月に変更しても先月の償却費が今月の償却費に上乗せされない。

entry.title: 2PD – Provision for Doubtful Receivables not updating for new items in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, 

I’m currently working on the 2PD – Provisioning of Overdue Receivables scope item in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I’ve encountered a behavior that I’d like to confirm with the community. 

 

To give you a bit more context: 

  • Transfer Posting job (Step 1) and batch sessions work correctly:
    • Overdue receivables are transferred to Special G/L indicator E (doubtful receivables) 
  • Customer master data is correctly maintained:
    • Company code view available 
    • Value Adjustment Key assigned (R1) 
  • Provision matrix is configured (based on ageing buckets and percentages) 
  • Valuation area is correctly maintained (FR) 

 

The issue observed is: 

When running the “Provisions for Doubtful Receivables” job (Step 2): 

  • Only one old receivable is returned in the output 
  • The same item appears repeatedly across runs 
  • For this item:  
    • “Until Provision” = 0 
    • Posting amount = 0
  • New overdue receivables (which were correctly picked up by Step 1) are not considered in Step 2 

 

My question is: 

  • Why are newly transferred doubtful receivables (Step 1) not appearing in Step 2? 

Even though: 

  • They are overdue 
  • They are assigned to Special G/L E 
  • They fall into valid ageing buckets 

 

Thank you in advance for your insights! 
Happy to provide more details if needed

entry.title: Additional “Attributes” button is displayed in CJ8VH variant selection screen after upgrade
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We found a screen difference in transaction CJ8VH between the pre-upgrade and post-upgrade environments.

In transaction CJ8VH, when opening the selection variant screen for variant 2025TEST, an additional “Attributes” button with an edit icon is displayed in the application toolbar in the upgraded environment.

  • Pre-upgrade environment: R4M
  • Post-upgrade environment: R3M
  •

entry.title: Change "Open on Key date" in the "Overdue receivables" app
entry.content:
Hello,

is it possible to enter a specific date in the app "Overdue receivables" in the "Open on key date" field?

Or is it just possible to choose between TODAY, TOMORROW, YESTERDAY, FIRSTDAYOFTHEYEAR,...

Kind regards

Fabian

entry.title: Certification SAP Finance
entry.content:
Bonjour,

Je me prépare pour passer la certification SAP Finance.

Pourriez-vous me fournir des conseils sur la méthodologique de préparation de la certification ?

Merci.

entry.title: PO Line Item Discount [IssueResolved - Please Ignore This Post]
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

I would like to seek your guidance regarding supplier invoice posting behavior in SAP. Currently, when I apply a PO line item discount in a purchase order, the system only reduces the net purchase/invoice value, and no separate G/L posting is generated for the discount amount during supplier invoice posting.

My requirement is to post the discount amount to a separate G/L account (e.g., a purchase discount account). Example of accounting entry expected:

  • Dr. Expense
  •     Cr. AP
  •     Cr. Purchase Discount

I have tried creating a custom condition type and maintaining the account mapping in SSCUI “Set Calculation Schema - Purchasing”, but the system still does not trigger any separate posting for the discount amount during Supplier Invoice posting.

May I know whether there is any standard SAP configuration or recommended best practice to achieve this requirement? If separate posting for PO discounts is not standard SAP behavior, what would be the recommended alternative approach?

Thank you in advance for your guidance.

Best regards,

HY

entry.title: Programm 6PP2 nicht anlegbar
entry.content:
Hallo Zusammen, wir versuchen analog Hinweis https://me.sap.com/notes/0002368183 das Programm 6PP2 und 6PP3 anzulegen. 6PP3 hatte problemlos funktioniert, aber 6PP2 funktioniert nicht. 

Wir erhalten die Meldung im Anhang und kommen nicht weiter. 

Meldungsnummer: BL001

 

 

Danke und Grüße, Jana Häußler
